title: Knowledge.
content:
Knowledge to one is a goddess both heavenly and high, to another
    Only an excellent cow, yielding the butter he wants.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Friedrich Schiller, titled "Knowledge.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
